title: aster acer
intro: Aster acer, also known as the bitter Aster, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is commonly found in North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its bitter properties, which are believed to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The medicinal properties of Aster acer include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to alleviate menstrual cramps and other digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Aster acer can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
